behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all key files (program.ts in cli-client, commands.ts and program.ts in cli-daemon, session.ts, mcp/config.ts, SKILL.md), the schema keys (cdp, cdpEndpoint), and the CLI flags (--cdp, --endpoint, --extension).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to add/move but doesn't give exact code; agent must figure out implementation.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_config_cdp_endpoint_in_isolation requires literal 'cdpEndpoint: options.cdp' or 'cdpEndpoint: cliOptions.cdp'; test_attach_conflict_detection requires exact string 'attachTarget && (args.cdp || args.endpoint || args.extension)' — alternate equivalent code (e.g., using !== undefined, different variable name, or separate if-checks) would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Nearly all f2p tests are string-in-file checks (e.g., test_global_options_includes_cdp, test_attach_schema_has_cdp_option, test_daemon_registers_cdp_flag, test_skill_md_attach_has_extension) with no execution of the CLI.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p requires specific tokens that wouldn't exist in a stub; a stub returning defaults wouldn't add 'cdp' to globalOptions or register --cdp flag.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all behaviors listed in instruction: cdp option, extension moved to attach, conflict detection, schema, session passing, config mapping, SKILL.md docs.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with header comments ('FAIL TO PASS TESTS', 'PASS TO PASS TESTS') and each has a docstring.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code modification, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and paths appear correct; minor 'pass_to_pas' typo in truncated comment doesn't affect task.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction identifies files but this localization guidance is appropriate for a refactoring task spanning multiple files.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd-edits task.
